professionalSummary.intro: Senior Full-stack Engineer with 15+ years of experience building scalable enterprise SaaS platforms, specializing in ReactJS, TypeScript, and GraphQL architectures. Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams and delivering mission-critical systems for global clients.
keyStrengths: Expert in full-stack development with ReactJS, TypeScript, Node.js, and GraphQL (Apollo) for enterprise applications
Strong backend architecture experience including microservices, event-driven systems, and API integrations
Led teams of 6+ engineers across frontend, backend, QA, and mobile disciplines
Demonstrated success stabilizing struggling projects and migrating legacy systems to modern architectures
Strong English communication with 3+ years of experience collaborating with US-based clients and stakeholders

Managed cross-functional team of 6 engineers delivering trust and safety systems with fraud detection capabilities
Established enterprise framework (FPT.SmartCore) enabling rapid business feature development across web and desktop applications
Delivered solutions for major financial institutions including Hanoi Stock Exchange and State Bank of Vietnam
